_comment: CentOS Stream 9 GenericCloud -- dnf FAMILY with a RECIPE-PINNED repo (CentOS Stream's default metalink sprawls across mirrors the allowlist can't enumerate, so pin to mirror.stream.centos.org, which IS allowlisted; centos.org is a mirror_ca_parent). Pinned to an IMMUTABLE dated image (not the floating -latest symlink) so upstream_sha256 does not drift. OPERATOR must keep upstream_sha256 matching the image (build fails closed until sha256 matches). Guest dnf routes through the SSL-bump cache proxy. $basearch is a dnf var (kept literal). Base packages only -- the consumer own installer pulls its deps.
repo_content:
[baseos-drvps]
name=CentOS Stream 9 BaseOS (drvps pinned)
baseurl=https://mirror.stream.centos.org/9-stream/BaseOS/$basearch/os/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=1
gpgkey=file:///etc/pki/rpm-gpg/RPM-GPG-KEY-centosofficial
[appstream-drvps]
name=CentOS Stream 9 AppStream (drvps pinned)
baseurl=https://mirror.stream.centos.org/9-stream/AppStream/$basearch/os/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=1
gpgkey=file:///etc/pki/rpm-gpg/RPM-GPG-KEY-centosofficial
